scripts.buildWin: npm run buildServerWin && npm run copyServerWin && npm run buildModulesWin &&npm run buildFrameWorkWin && npm run buildExtensionWin
scripts.buildLinuxX64: npm run buildServerLinux && npm run copyServerLinux && npm run buildModulesLinux && npm run buildFrameWorkLinux && npm run buildExtensionLinux
scripts.buildLinuxArm: npm run copyServerLinuxArm && npm run buildModulesLinux && npm run buildFrameWorkLinux && npm run buildExtensionLinux
scripts.buildServerWin: cd .\server\build && python download_third_party.py && python build.py build --release
scripts.buildServerLinux: export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && cd ./server/build && python3 download_third_party.py && python3 build.py build --release
scripts.buildFrameWorkWin: cd framework && npm install --force && npm run build && npm run copyWin
scripts.buildFrameWorkLinux: cd framework && npm install --force && npm run build && npm run copyLinux
scripts.buildExtensionWin: cd .\plugins\vscode && npm install && npm run vsce:package
